emails.subject: Deal Ticket 329242; Meter 986887
emails.body: Deal Ticket 329242; Meter 986887 There is a drab of gas; 34 MM's on the first of August on the meter. Probably from valving off. The above ref'd deal was from Jul, do you want to extend it for one day? Let me know. Mary 35251
